heading: Collectors
body:
The following table describes the collectors that can be used inside of the [$search](pipe.$search)
and [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) aggregation pipeline stages to return a document representing the
[metadata results](fts-metadata-results) of your MongoDB Search query. This results document
is typically an aggregation over the matching MongoDB Search query results. The
table also shows the MongoDB Search [supported](bson-data-types) that the
collector supports.

| Collector | Description                                                                                                           | Supported Field Types    |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------ |
| facet     | Groups query results by values or ranges in specified, faceted fields and returns the count for each of those groups. | datenumbertoken (string) |
